description: VERIFIED LIVE: Internet Archive (archive.org) via its public APIs — full-text item search, item metadata, and Wayback Machine snapshot lookup. No token needed. Tested live by Claude Code: advancedsearch, metadata and wayback/available all returned 200 with real data.

tools.name: ia_search
tools.description: Search Internet Archive items (books, audio, video, software). VERIFIED.

tools.name: ia_metadata
tools.description: Full metadata + file list for an item by identifier. VERIFIED.

tools.name: ia_wayback
tools.description: Find the closest Wayback Machine snapshot of a URL. VERIFIED.

params.name: timestamp
params.description: Optional YYYYMMDD to find the snapshot nearest that date.
